"The systems must be fast, stable, and predictable under load. That requirement guides every design decision."
Nerve Solutions
Software Engineer · Mumbai, India Jul 2025 — Present
Kotak Securities Philip Capital Julius Baer Vikabh
  • Build trading infrastructure for brokerage and financial clients — systems that execute and monitor positions at scale.
  • Develop market monitoring systems detecting price anomalies and triggering automated alerts in real time.
  • Design feed receivers ingesting real-time market data from exchange and broker APIs, normalising for internal systems.
  • Implement trading APIs enabling automated order execution and strategy deployment across multiple brokerages.
  • Optimise backend services processing large volumes of market data — improving reliability and reducing latency.
  • Translate ideas from quantitative analysts and traders into production-grade software.
  • Holds a pending patent in machine learning — built for agriculture, not finance. Range is a feature, not a flaw.
  • Vasai-born. Mumbai-built. Two very different cities sharing the same commute.
  • Swims to think. Codes to execute. The pool is where the architecture happens.
Cinema
From Tarkovsky's silence to Kubrick's geometry — film as the highest compression of thought. Watches for structure, not spectacle. Every great director is really a systems engineer.
Music
Ambient, classical, jazz — anything with architecture underneath. Music as a model for how systems breathe. Listens while thinking through problems that code alone can't solve.
Philosophy
Stoics, Camus, Wittgenstein — whoever asks the hardest questions about clarity and meaning. Philosophy as the debugging layer beneath all decisions. Logic is just applied Stoicism.
Poetry
Borges, Neruda, Rumi — the ones who packed infinite into small containers. Studies poetry the same way he studies good API design: precision, economy, saying exactly what you mean and nothing more.
History
Reads more history than technical papers. Every financial crisis, empire's fall, paradigm shift — all pattern recognition. What happened before is the edge most engineers skip entirely.
Space Science
Follows orbital mechanics, exoplanet research, and deep space missions. The universe as the largest distributed system ever built — no documentation, no rollback, somehow still works.
Selected Work 01  –  03
Signal through the noise
01
2024

Stock Price
Alert System

A real-time surveillance engine for stock prices with threshold-based notifications. Flask backend wired to live financial APIs — Pandas logic watches the market continuously. Configurable thresholds, zero noise tolerance, built for traders who need signal without distraction.

PythonFlask Financial APIsPandas Real-time Data
Precision in motion
02
2024

Portfolio
Risk Analyzer

Analysis engine for portfolio risk and returns against historical data. Computes volatility, correlation matrices, and key risk metrics — surfaces them through visualisation dashboards that make the invisible legible to any stakeholder, technical or otherwise.

PythonPandas NumPyStatistical Analysis Visualisation
Built to last
03
2023

Market Data
Pipeline

ETL pipeline engineered for ingesting and persisting high-frequency market data at scale. Normalised into MongoDB, exposed through REST endpoints — a queryable archive of market history available to any internal system, on demand, without latency compromise.

PythonFlask MongoDBETL REST API
